comment.body:
Emotions and mindset. That's it. The weakness of mankind is in their ego and pride and emotions take them over so quickly. 

What I can't understand is how people don't see beyond the general analysis you put out and see how generous you are with your time and knowledge....

AND HOW MUCH YOU CARE FOR PEOPLE. 

The fruit of your work and care shows us all so much. That's all that matters Alma.
